title: Project honest Codex plugin subagent hooks
action: Extend the one semantic hook catalog so the Codex plugin projection maps both mandatory SubagentStart and SubagentStop events to one new shared bee-codex-subagent-audit handler (D1, D2). The handler distinguishes start/stop, uses only bounded allowlisted event fields, follows the shared adapter and fixture-local logging pattern, and never claims native pre-spawn denial. Keep Claude model-guard behavior unchanged and encode every capability difference structurally. Render and test hooks/hooks.json as the authoritative Codex plugin hook payload and hooks/claude-hooks.json as the Claude payload; keep repo fallback rendering explicit but do not hand-edit source-checkout .codex/hooks.json (D3, D8, D9). Mirror shipped handler/adapter runtime files and prove malformed-input, audit-failure, start/stop topology, package-default discovery, and no-false-authority behavior. Preserve unrelated hunks.

truths: The Codex plugin hook payload contains SubagentStart and SubagentStop bindings to one shared audit handler.
SubagentStart is post-start bootstrap/audit; no code, prose, or test claims native spawn blocking.
Claude pre-spawn model-guard behavior is unchanged and all runtime differences are named structural assertions.
Plugin hook commands resolve from the plugin root and do not depend on project fallback paths.
Fallback projections remain catalog-derived test surfaces and never substitute for the plugin payload.

artifacts.substantive: one semantic catalog projects the paired Codex events and explicit runtime differences
bounded shared start/stop handler with no pre-spawn authority claim
catalog-derived authoritative Codex plugin hook payload
behavior, plugin discovery, fallback, and allowed-difference tests
shipped runtime mirror of the new handler

key_links: catalog renderer emits the same handler into both supported Codex native-subagent event groups
plugin-root command resolution reaches the shared handler and adapter without project .codex fallback
contract tests distinguish plugin payload proof from repo fallback proof
prohibitions: Do not copy the Claude model guard into Codex as a false blocking adapter.
Do not treat audit logging as authorization or execution gating.
Do not ingest arbitrary prompt, transcript, environment, secret, or credential content.
Do not hand-edit source-checkout .codex/hooks.json or .agents skills as plugin delivery.
Do not change installer cleanup or state-owner behavior in this cell.

verify: node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && git diff --check

trace.outcome: Added catalog-driven, bounded audit-only Codex SubagentStart/SubagentStop handling for plugin and generated repo projections; Claude behavior unchanged and root fallback excluded from release byte-equality proof.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": [
    "hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs catalog/projection, route, malformed-input, and fail-open coverage",
    "hooks/test_model_guard.mjs Claude pre-spawn guard regression coverage",
    "scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs vendored mirror integrity coverage"
  ],
  "tests_added_or_changed": [
    "Declared and proved all three directional catalog differences",
    "Added exact Codex plugin SubagentStart/SubagentStop audit topology proof",
    "Added generated repo projection topology and root/nested fixture execution proof",
    "Added paired bounded allowlist, sensitive-field exclusion, malformed-input, and write-failure audit rows",
    "Added canonical and vendored audit handlers plus mirror equality coverage"
  ],
  "red_failure_evidence": [
    "Before this cell, the catalog had no SubagentStart event and Codex SubagentStop contained only shared state-sync and chain-nudge handlers.",
    "Before this cell, hooks/hooks.json contained no Codex subagent audit command and both canonical/vendored bee-codex-subagent-audit.mjs files were absent.",
    "The prior release proof compared generated repo output byte-for-byte with root .codex/hooks.json, contrary to locked D9 fallback semantics."
  ],
  "verification_run": [
    "node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && git diff --check",
    "Hook contracts: 145 rows across 17 groups, 0 skipped, 0 failing; ALL PASS.",
    "Model guard: ALL PASS.",
    "Library mirror: 17 files byte-identical; injected-diff/missing/extra self-tests pass.",
    "git diff --check: pass."
  ],
  "deliberate_exceptions": [
    "Root .codex/hooks.json was intentionally not modified or used as release byte-equality proof per D9; its existing fallback routes remain regression-tested separately.",
    "hooks/claude-hooks.json was intentionally unchanged.",
    "No git commit was attempted because this worker environment exposes git metadata read-only."
  ]
}
